name: Expansion Map Assets
description: Pack of static objects for decoration and BuilderItems used by other Expansion mods.
overview:
DayZ Expansion Map Assets is a pack of static objects for decoration purposes. It also includes BuilderItems used by the base building system.

This mod provides physical assets consumed by other Expansion modules — it does not have its own configuration files.
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @DayZ-Expansion-MapAssets to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Both clients and servers must have this mod loaded.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure @DayZ-Expansion-MapAssets is loaded on both client and server.
Verify mod version matches between client and server.

useCases.title: Full Expansion Experience
useCases.description: Install Map Assets to get all custom structures and objects used by other Expansion modules.
